nodes.name: README.md
nodes.summary: Usage guide for the translation engine benchmark suite, documenting how to run examples/benchmark.py with its --engines, --dry-run, --force and related options, and describing the poem and FontLab test documents.

nodes.name: benchmark_results.json
nodes.summary: Persisted machine-readable benchmark output produced by examples/benchmark.py, recording per-engine translation speed, throughput, and success/failure metrics across the test documents.

nodes.name: benchmark_results.md
nodes.summary: Narrative analysis of the translation engine benchmark, comparing local MLX vs GGUF backends, model sizes, and cataloguing failure modes (API length limits, volume/path errors, network timeouts, LM Studio connectivity).
